parameters.text: Use the SubWorkflowTool to process some data

parameters.name: SubWorkflowTool
parameters.description: A tool that processes data through a workflow with a wait node
parameters.workflowJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ "nodes": [ { "parameters": {}, "type": "n8n-nodes-base.executeWorkflowTrigger", "typeVersion": 1, "position": [0, 0], "id": "sub-trigger-id", "name": "Execute Workflow Trigger" }, { "parameters": { "resume": "webhook", "options": {} }, "type": "n8n-nodes-base.wait", "typeVersion": 1.1, "position": [220, 0], "id": "wait-node-id", "name": "Wait for Webhook" }, { "parameters": { "jsCode": "return [{ json: { result: 'Final result: processed' } }];" }, "type": "n8n-nodes-base.code", "typeVersion": 2, "position": [440, 0], "id": "code-node-id", "name": "Process Data" } ], "connections": { "Execute Workflow Trigger": { "main": [[{ "node": "Wait for Webhook", "type": "main", "index": 0 }]] }, "Wait for Webhook": { "main": [[{ "node": "Process Data", "type": "main", "index": 0 }]] } } }) }}
